channel.title: Harz Digital Products — 259 Items
channel.description: 259 premium digital products across 45 categories — Notion OS, AI prompts, courses, templates, ebooks, developer tools. Prices from ₦1,000. Instant delivery.

item.title: Notion Productivity OS — All-in-One Life Dashboard ($17.99)
item.description: Complete productivity system in Notion. Tasks, goals, habits, finance, projects — all in one dashboard.

item.title: Freelancer Starter Kit — Contracts, Invoices & Proposals ($11.99)
item.description: Everything freelancers need: contract templates, invoice generators, proposal templates, and client management tools.

item.title: Complete Digital Marketing Masterclass 2026 ($49.99)
item.description: Master social media marketing, Facebook & Google Ads, SEO, content marketing, and email funnels.

item.title: AI Image Generation Mastery — Midjourney & DALL-E Guide ($12.99)
item.description: Complete guide to AI image generation using Midjourney and DALL-E. Prompt engineering, style guides, and workflows.

item.title: Ultimate Canva Business Template Bundle — 200 Slides ($19.99)
item.description: 200 professional Canva templates for business presentations, social media, and marketing materials.
